name: Transaction
documentation: Represents a Proof transaction response payload.

properties.name: DetailedStatus
properties.documentation: Gets the detailed transaction lifecycle status.

properties.name: Status
properties.documentation: Gets the coarse transaction status string returned by Proof.

properties.name: CreatedAt
properties.documentation: Gets when the transaction was created.

properties.name: UpdatedAt
properties.documentation: Gets when the transaction was last updated.
